title: AI-assisted Problem Solver: Elevate DSA Practice with Azure OpenAI Coach
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI assistant guiding users through a LeetCode-style problem, highlighting real-time coding help, model-switching, and seamless integration with the coding workflow.
core_message: CodeGrind combines a real-time code editor with an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant to help users solve DSA problems more efficiently. The AI offers problem-solving guidance, model switching, and persistent chat within the practice environment, improving learning flow without leaving the editor.
cta: Try the AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind now
visual_brief: Short to mid-length walkthrough video: show the in-editor AI chat guiding a LeetCode-style problem, model-switching UI, and real-time code execution. Include UI chrome, problem panel, code editor, and AI responses with subtle cyberpunk aesthetic elements.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an AI-assisted Problem Solver that sits inside the editor, pairing a real-time chat with an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant to guide you through LeetCode-style problems. Features include problem-solving guidance, model switching, and persistent chat within the practice environment for a smoother learning flow without leaving the editor. Try the AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind now: https://codegrind.online
